name: skycloud-inet
description: OctoBus package for SKYCloud iNet batch IP block and unblock work orders.

SKYCloud_INET.SKYCloud_INET/BatchBlockIP.name: batch-block-ip
SKYCloud_INET.SKYCloud_INET/BatchBlockIP.description: Create SKYCloud iNet block work orders for a batch of IPs.

SKYCloud_INET.SKYCloud_INET/BatchUnblock.name: batch-unblock-ip
SKYCloud_INET.SKYCloud_INET/BatchUnblock.description: Create SKYCloud iNet unblock work orders for a batch of IPs.
